title: Work through a set of BENCH- TODO tasks in a live ServiceNow instance
task:
Open {{instance_url}} in the browser (you are already signed in) and work through these TODO tasks in the Task list. Only touch tasks whose short description starts with "BENCH-":
1. Mark the task "BENCH-Renew-license" as Closed Complete.
2. Change the priority of the task "BENCH-Update-runbook" to 2 - High.
3. Create a new task with short description "BENCH-Standup-notes" and priority 4 - Low.
When all three are done, reply with a one-line summary of what you changed.
notes: Captured from the ServiceNow TODO test sessions (July 2026). Ground truth and reset go through the REST Table API; the agent under test drives the UI.
